rules.name: Clarity
rules.description: Unclear intent, confusing logic, or hard-to-follow code. Suggest clearer structure or naming.

rules.name: Naming
rules.description: Names that mislead, are overly generic, or hide important meaning.

rules.name: Error Handling
rules.description: Missing/incorrect error handling, swallowed errors, or brittle assumptions about failure modes.

rules.name: Security Footgun
rules.description: Potential security issues like unsafe input handling, injection risks, secrets exposure, or overly-permissive behavior.

rules.name: API Contract
rules.description: Mismatch between API usage and expected contracts (types, nullability, invariants, or assumptions).

rules.name: Complexity
rules.description: Unnecessary complexity, deeply nested logic, or code that would benefit from refactoring.

rules.name: Performance Hot Path
rules.description: Likely performance problems (extra work in loops, repeated allocations, unnecessary I/O) in code that may run often.

rules.name: Maintainability
rules.description: Hard to extend or change safely; missing separation of concerns, tight coupling, or implicit dependencies.

rules.name: Testing Gap
rules.description: Code changes that likely need tests or lack coverage for edge cases.

rules.name: Docs Mismatch
rules.description: Comments/docs that are outdated, misleading, or missing for non-obvious behavior.
